description: Sector overlay for broadcasters, publishers, digital media, advertising/media operations, broadcasting authorisations, editorial governance, complaints, and audience/subscriber data in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Media. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: National Communications Authority licensing and authorisation
National Media Commission Act, 1993 (Act 449)
primary_sources.issuer: National Media Commission / Parliament of Ghana

primary_sources.name: Electronic Communications Act and NCA legal instruments

rules.title: Broadcasting authorisation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NCA broadcasting authorisation, FM radio authorisation, TV broadcasting authorisation, spectrum, or licence evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Electronic Communications Act / NCA legal instruments

rules.title: Editorial standards, complaint-handling, or media responsibility evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for journalistic standards, correction, complaint handling, right of reply, editorial policy, or National Media Commission references.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Audience, subscriber, source, or employee data-protection controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, source confidentiality, subscriber data, consent, retention, and data security evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Content governance or publication approval controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for content review, advertising clearance, accuracy, misleading claims, complaint escalation, or takedown controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
